# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Nano Server font support**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 adds FreeType-based font rendering support for Windows Nano Server.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Platform

- **FreeType font support on Windows Nano Server** — SkiaSharp now uses FreeType as the font backend on Windows Nano Server, enabling font rendering in minimal container environments where GDI-based fonts are unavailable. — ❤️ [@jeffska](https://github.com/jeffska) ([#4280](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4280))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!
